title: Cold Start Mitigation Strategies
description: Implement various cold start mitigation strategies, including provisioned concurrency and architectural warmers. Optimize serverless function bundle sizes to improve cold-start performance and meet P99 latency requirements.
objectives: Implement various cold start mitigation strategies, including provisioned concurrency and architectural warmers.
Optimize serverless function bundle sizes to improve cold-start performance and meet P99 latency requirements.
